next_steps: Perform repetitive nerve stimulation and single-fiber electromyography
Test for serum acetylcholine receptor antibodies
Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation
Echocardiogram with strain imaging to evaluate for amyloid infiltration
Cardiac magnetic resonance imaging with late gadolinium enhancement
Lumbar puncture for cerebrospinal fluid analysis
Trial of edrophonium or pyridostigmine under controlled conditions
Measure acid alpha-glucosidase activity in blood (for Pompe disease)
Repetitive nerve stimulation and single-fiber electromyography
Echocardiogram with global longitudinal strain imaging
Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation
Pulmonary function tests including negative inspiratory force and vital capacity in supine and upright positions
Cardiac MRI with late gadolinium enhancement
